prompt: Create reference guide for TypeScript utility types

assertions.name: both_versions_exist
assertions.description: Both Vietnamese and English files are created

assertions.name: guide_style_used
assertions.description: Uses guide/reference style appropriate for utility type documentation

assertions.name: covers_all_ten_types
assertions.description: Covers all 10 utility types: Partial, Required, Readonly, Pick, Omit, Record, Exclude, Extract, NonNullable, ReturnType

assertions.name: has_code_examples
assertions.description: Each utility type has before/after code examples

assertions.name: has_real_world_scenarios
assertions.description: Includes practical real-world use cases for the utility types

assertions.name: has_decision_guidance
assertions.description: Provides guidance on when to use which utility type

assertions.name: has_reference_table
assertions.description: Includes quick reference table of all utility types
